interventions.name: IO102-IO103
interventions.description: IO102-IO103 comprises IDO peptide antigen (IO102) and PD-L1 peptide antigen (IO103) emulsified with adjuvant (Montanide ISA 51 VG) administered subcutaneously

identificationModule.briefTitle: Phase II Study of Metastatic Melanoma With Lymphodepleting Conditioning and Infusion of Anti-MART-1 F5 TCR-Gene-Engineered Lymphocytes
identificationModule.officialTitle: Phase II Study of Metastatic Melanoma Using Lymphodepleting Conditioning Followed by Infusion of Anti-MART-1 F5 TCR-Gene Engineered Lymphocytes

interventions.name: autologous anti-MART-1 F5 T-cell receptor
interventions.description:
Autologous anti-MART-1 F5 T-cell receptor gene-engineered tumor infiltrating lymphocytes.

A minimum of approximately 5 X 10\^8 cells will be given up to 3x10\^11 anti-MART-1 F5 TCR engineered TIL or PBL.
armGroupLabels: anti-MART-1 F5 TCR PBL + HD IL-2

interventions.name: Cyclophosphamide
interventions.description: Day -7 to -5: Cyclophosphamide 60 mg/kg/day X 2 days intravenous (IV) in 250 ml D5W with mesna 15 mg/kg/day X 2 days over 1 hr
armGroupLabels: anti-MART-1 F5 TCR PBL + HD IL-2
anti-MART-1 F5 TCR TIL + HD IL-2

interventions.name: Fludarabine
interventions.description: Day -5 to 1: Fludarabine 25 mg/m\^2/day intravenous piggy back (IVPB) daily over 30 minutes for 5 days
armGroupLabels: anti-MART-1 F5 TCR PBL + HD IL-2
anti-MART-1 F5 TCR TIL + HD IL-2

interventions.name: Aldesleukin
interventions.description: Day 0: Cells will be infused intravenously (i.v.). Patients will receive up to 3x10e\^11 (with a minimum of 5x10e\^8 cells) anti-MART-1 F5 TCR engineered TIL or PBL Aldesleukin (based on total body weight) 720,000 IU/kg intravenous (IV) over 15 minute every eight hours beginning within 24 hours of cell infusion
armGroupLabels: anti-MART-1 F5 TCR PBL + HD IL-2
anti-MART-1 F5 TCR TIL + HD IL-2

interventions.name: autologous anti-MART-1 F5 T-cell receptor gene-engineered tumor infiltrating lymphocytes
armGroupLabels: anti-MART-1 F5 TCR TIL + HD IL-2

locations.facility: National Institutes of Health Clinical Center, 9000 Rockville Pike
